name: Karybdis Tyrannos
notes: Spawns at 50% HP already kiting — can be 80km+ from entry point immediately. Send drones the moment you land or it escapes range entirely. No EWAR. Dies fast if you catch it early. Every second it lives wastes time and gate distance.  ·  Damage: Omni  ·  Weak to: EM  ·  Tier-dependent HP/DPS. This is the name all Drifter battleships use in combat log.
quick_handle: Spawns at 50% HP already kiting — can be 80km+ from entry point immediately.
behavior: Spawns at 50% HP already kiting — can be 80km+ from entry point immediately. Send drones the moment you land or it escapes range entirely. No EWAR. Dies fast if you catch it early. Every second it lives wastes time and gate distance.

name: Scylla Tyrannos
